esa x.kuk dk;Z bl vf/lwpuk dh izdk'ku frfFk ls izkjEHk dj rhu o"kZ dh vof/ ds vUrxZr iw.kZ gksxh A ¹iQk- la- 9@5@2009&lh vkj Mh (,u ih vkj)&[k.M&Vº p- pUæekSfy] ukxfjd iathdj.k ds egkjftLVªkj 5129 GI/2013 MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS (OFFICE OF THE REGISTRAR GENERAL, INDIA) ORDER New Delhi, the 5th December, 2013 S.O. 3591(E).— Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 18 of the Citizenship Act, 1955, the Central Government has made the Citizenship (Registration of Citizens and Issue of National Identity Cards) Rules, 2003 which provides under sub-rule (3) of rule 4A that the Registrar General of Citizens Registration shall notify the period and duration of the enumeration in the Official Gazette; And whereas, the Central Government has decided to update the National Register of Citizens, 1951 in the State of Assam; Now, therefore, pursuant to the provisions of sub- rule (3) of rule 4A of the Citizenship (Registration of Citizens and Issue of National Identity Cards) Rules, 2003, the Registrar General of Citizens Registration hereby notifies that the enumeration in respect of the State of Assam shall take place from the date of publication of this notification and shall be completed within a period of three years. [F.No. 9/5/2009-CRD (NPR)-Vol.V] C. CHANDRAMOULI, Registrar General of Citizen Registration Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
